h4ef89786g6b73g4f6ega5f8gc75bf9c431f1: Gods, look what they did to him. That could've been me...

h15563c6eg394bg40b4gbaefgf3a73757543f: But he was a Flaming Fist. That made us better than brothers.
hd9395f86ga772g42cega12ag2a6b6f649cfe: This is a bloodbath. What happened here?

hfe51e2fag4816g42a3g9a94g323f3668a1ba: ... even our Gauntlet. Thought she'd outlive us all.
hb3ffd8a1gd858g41a0ga9d5g7f7692a0a0f3: There are Zhentarim nearby. They've got a hideout, and I know how to get in.
